summary: Focused on algorithmic crypto trading platforms, computer vision research, and automation tooling. Also built hardware emulation firmware, Android LLM assistants, and developer productivity utilities.

items.title: Profile README and CV automation
items.description: Iterated on the GitHub profile README with automated CV timeline generation and activity charts.

items.title: Profile card generator
items.description: Built custom SVG profile cards with light/dark theme support and a weekly CV workflow.

items.title: Clash.Meta fork maintenance
items.description: Maintained a Mihomo fork with XHTTP support for the FlClash client.

items.title: TelePilot2 n8n node
items.description: Iterated on the Telegram automation node for n8n, including CI fixes and a new album trigger.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility
items.description: Polished the Intag file-tagging tool for Windows, preparing v2 release and Microsoft Store submission.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Set up and refined a Neovim IDE configuration with LSP, treesitter, and pre-commit hooks.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic on-host labeling tool for personal computer vision projects.

items.title: TelePilot2 node fixes
items.description: Addressed session storage and client initialization issues in the n8n Telegram node.

items.title: Intag v2 release prep
items.description: Prepared the Intag file-tagging tool for v2.0 release with Microsoft Store listing.

items.title: Intag2 private fork
items.description: Worked on a private C++ fork of the Intag file-tagging utility with additional styling.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Built feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3 in C++.

items.title: Ozwil Android LLM assistant
items.description: Developed an Android app with on-device LLM capabilities for phone use.

items.title: Freqtrade strategies
items.description: Worked on custom trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot in Python.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built a multi-session autonomous coding assistant using TypeScript.

items.title: CV and input emulation research
items.description: Experimented with computer vision, mouse/keyboard emulation, and screen capture in C++.

items.title: Crypto algo trading platform
items.description: Developed a SaaS algorithmic trading platform with AI and neural network components in C#.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted R&D on cryptocurrency price prediction models using Python.

items.title: Poker computer vision research
items.description: Explored computer vision techniques for online poker platforms in Python.

items.title: Profile README updates
items.description: Maintained the GitHub profile README with periodic updates.

items.title: Intag early development
items.description: Started the Windows Explorer file-tagging utility, adding CLI and UI polish.
